# The Savior

Purpose: ambient reflection app with guided prompts, candle visuals, and shareable runtime brief
Free entry point: free static ritual experience
Paid boundary: premium theme packs, private journal export, and supporter bundle
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/the-savior/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/the-savior
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/the-savior/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/the-savior/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: mailto:ehdjs1351@gmail.com?subject=The%20Savior%20private%20workspace&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20premium%20theme%20packs%2C%20private%20journal%20export%2C%20and%20supporter%20bundle%20for%20The%20Savior.

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for The Savior demo, The Savior system architecture, The Savior lifestyle tool, ambient reflection app with guided prompts, candle visuals, and shareable runtime brief service.
